title: pectis stenophylla var. rosei
intro: Pectis stenophylla var. rosei, also known as the rose prickly poppy, is a flowering plant species within the family Asteraceae. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Pectis stenophylla var. rosei include reducing inflammation and alleviating various skin conditions, such as acne and wounds, as well as exhibiting antifungal properties. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to be used for its medicinal and health benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
